'''âth-z-b''' ('''kathazab''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:pulverise|pulverise]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| th-z-b
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:pulverise|pulverise]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âth-z-b
|-
! Lemma
| kathazab
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thithazab|thithazab]] || [[word:jithazab|jithazab]] || [[word:shithazab|shithazab]] || [[word:kithazab|kithazab]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthuthazab|thuthuthazab]] || [[word:jujuthazab|jujuthazab]] || [[word:shushuthazab|shushuthazab]] || [[word:kukuthazab|kukuthazab]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thuthazab|thuthazab]] || [[word:juthazab|juthazab]] || [[word:shuthazab|shuthazab]] || [[word:kuthazab|kuthazab]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thuthazab|thuthazab]] || [[word:juthazab|juthazab]] || [[word:shuthazab|shuthazab]] || [[word:kuthazab|kuthazab]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thethazab|thethazab]] || [[word:jethazab|jethazab]] || [[word:shethazab|shethazab]] || [[word:kethazab|kethazab]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothothazab|thothothazab]] || [[word:jojothazab|jojothazab]] || [[word:shoshothazab|shoshothazab]] || [[word:kokothazab|kokothazab]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thothazab|thothazab]] || [[word:jothazab|jothazab]] || [[word:shothazab|shothazab]] || [[word:kothazab|kothazab]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thothazab|thothazab]] || [[word:jothazab|jothazab]] || [[word:shothazab|shothazab]] || [[word:kothazab|kothazab]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thĂŠthazab|thĂŠthazab]] || [[word:jĂŠthazab|jĂŠthazab]] || [[word:shĂŠthazab|shĂŠthazab]] || [[word:kĂŠthazab|kĂŠthazab]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathathazab|thathathazab]] || [[word:jajathazab|jajathazab]] || [[word:shashathazab|shashathazab]] || [[word:kakathazab|kakathazab]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thathazab|thathazab]] || [[word:jathazab|jathazab]] || [[word:shathazab|shathazab]] || [[word:kathazab|kathazab]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thathazab|thathazab]] || [[word:jathazab|jathazab]] || [[word:shathazab|shathazab]] || [[word:kathazab|kathazab]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shathazab|shathazab]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshathazab|goshathazab]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishathazab|gokishathazab]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shathazabnĂŒ|shathazabnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshathazabnknĂŒ|goshathazabnknĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishathazabnĂŒ|gokishathazabnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shathazabshĂ«|shathazabshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshathazabnkshĂ«|goshathazabnkshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishathazabshĂ«|gokishathazabshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shathazabro|shathazabro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshathazabnkro|goshathazabnkro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishathazabro|gokishathazabro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shathazabmu|shathazabmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshathazabnkmu|goshathazabnkmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishathazabmu|gokishathazabmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shathazabsher|shathazabsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshathazabnksher|goshathazabnksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishathazabsher|gokishathazabsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shathazabng|shathazabng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshathazabnkng|goshathazabnkng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishathazabng|gokishathazabng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shathazabya|shathazabya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshathazabnkya|goshathazabnkya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishathazabya|gokishathazabya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shathazabyam|shathazabyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshathazabnkyam|goshathazabnkyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishathazabyam|gokishathazabyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shathazabnĂŒshĂ«|shathazabnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshathazabnknĂŒshĂ«|goshathazabnknĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishathazabnĂŒshĂ«|gokishathazabnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shathazabnĂŒro|shathazabnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshathazabnknĂŒro|goshathazabnknĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishathazabnĂŒro|gokishathazabnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shathazabnĂŒmu|shathazabnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshathazabnknĂŒmu|goshathazabnknĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishathazabnĂŒmu|gokishathazabnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shathazabshĂ«nĂŒ|shathazabshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshathazabnkshĂ«nĂŒ|goshathazabnkshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishathazabshĂ«nĂŒ|gokishathazabshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shathazabshĂ«ro|shathazabshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshathazabnkshĂ«ro|goshathazabnkshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishathazabshĂ«ro|gokishathazabshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shathazabshĂ«mu|shathazabshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshathazabnkshĂ«mu|goshathazabnkshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishathazabshĂ«mu|gokishathazabshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shathazabronĂŒ|shathazabronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshathazabnkronĂŒ|goshathazabnkronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishathazabronĂŒ|gokishathazabronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shathazabroshĂ«|shathazabroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshathazabnkroshĂ«|goshathazabnkroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishathazabroshĂ«|gokishathazabroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shathazabromu|shathazabromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshathazabnkromu|goshathazabnkromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishathazabromu|gokishathazabromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shathazabmunĂŒ|shathazabmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshathazabnkmunĂŒ|goshathazabnkmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishathazabmunĂŒ|gokishathazabmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shathazabmushĂ«|shathazabmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshathazabnkmushĂ«|goshathazabnkmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishathazabmushĂ«|gokishathazabmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shathazabmuro|shathazabmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshathazabnkmuro|goshathazabnkmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishathazabmuro|gokishathazabmuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
